title: Group Anagrams
description:
Given an array of strings `strs`, group the anagrams together. Return the result as an array of arrays.

Anagrams are words formed by rearranging the same letters.

**For deterministic output:** sort each group alphabetically, then sort the groups by their first element.

**Example:**
```
strs = ["eat","tea","tan","ate","nat","bat"]
Result = [["ate","eat","tea"],["bat"],["nat","tan"]]
```
hints: Anagrams have the same characters — what if you sorted each word's letters?
Use the sorted letters as a key to group words.
A plain object works as a hash map: `obj[key] = obj[key] || []`
